function.name: recall_memory
function.description: Search long-term memory for relevant past information, preferences, or facts.

query.description: The search query to find relevant memories.

limit.description: Maximum number of memories to retrieve.

function.name: store_memory
function.description: Save important information, facts, or user preferences to long-term memory.

text.description: The content of the memory to store.

category.description: The category of the memory for better organization.
